opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My finger looks like a hot sausage, my left knee is full of fluid, and the throbbing pain is keeping me awake.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over a day my right index finger swelled up and my left knee filled with fluid — I can barely use my hand or walk; I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.character: whole right index finger swollen ('sausage'), left knee full of fluid, throbbing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right index finger and left knee (asymmetric)
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a flare after fatigue; I have psoriasis and nail pitting
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: ice and elevation help a little
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe fatigue before the joints flared; low-grade feverish feeling
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have psoriasis; joints have flared before but not this bad

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and can't prepare food with my dominant hand and sore knee

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the sausage digit and knee effusion clearly, in obvious pain

objective_data_offered.value: my whole right index finger is swollen and purplish; my left knee is swollen, warm and full of fluid
I have pitting in my nails
